seoTitle: How to Set Up a WhatsApp Campaign in Brevo
metaDescription: Launch a WhatsApp marketing campaign in Brevo, from verifying your sender number through Meta to building templates and tracking delivery results.
intro: Reaching customers directly on WhatsApp usually means wrestling with complicated Meta developer setups, but Brevo's omni-channel suite simplifies the process with a streamlined onboarding flow and a drag-and-drop message builder. This guide covers registering your number, building an approved template, and sending your first campaign.

steps.heading: Activate the WhatsApp app in Brevo
steps.body: From your Brevo account profile, activate the WhatsApp application to begin the omni-channel messaging setup.

steps.heading: Register and verify a sender number
steps.body: Use the embedded Meta Business verification wizard to register and link a dedicated phone number for sending WhatsApp messages.

steps.heading: Create a pre-approved message template
steps.body: Build your message using Brevo's conversational template builder, embedding rich media variables and quick-reply call-to-action buttons as needed.

steps.heading: Select your subscriber list target
steps.body: Choose which contact list or segment should receive the campaign before sending.

steps.heading: Send and review delivery metrics
steps.body: Launch the campaign and check the instant delivery reporting metrics to see how your messages performed.

faq.question: Do I need a Meta Business account to use WhatsApp campaigns in Brevo?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo's setup routes through Meta's business verification wizard to register and link your sending number.

faq.question: Why do WhatsApp messages need pre-approved templates?
faq.answer: Meta requires message templates to be approved in advance to prevent spam and maintain messaging quality across the platform.

faq.question: Can I include buttons in my WhatsApp messages?
faq.answer: Yes, Brevo's builder lets you map quick-reply call-to-action buttons directly into your message templates.

faq.question: How do I know if my WhatsApp campaign was delivered?
faq.answer: Brevo provides instant delivery reporting metrics after your campaign sends, showing how your messages performed.
